version_description: This version is from the 2003 'KISS Symphony Alive IV' album, and it is in a different key from the original track, ('Hot in the shade', 1989).

performance.name: KISS Symphony: Alive IV
performance.comment: It's in a different key to the original but I think it gives the song a more romantic feel.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Every Time I Look At You

content:
[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]B[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]B[/ch]
I gotta tell you what I'm feeling in-side[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C#m[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]B[/ch]
I could lie to my-self, but it's true[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]
There's no de-nying when I look in your eyes[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C#m[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]B[/ch]
Girl, I'm out of my head over you[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]

[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]B[/ch]
I lived so long believing all love is blind[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]B[/ch]
But everything a-bout you is telling me this time[/tab]

[Chorus]

[tab]         [ch]E[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]  [ch]C#m[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]F#m[/ch]
It's for-e-ver, this time I know it there's no doubt in my mind[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]B[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]B[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]F#m[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
For-e-ver. Until my life is through, girl I'll be lovin you for-e-ver.[/tab]

[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]B[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]B[/ch]
I hear the echo of a promise I made[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C#m[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]B[/ch]
When you're strong you can stand on your own[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]
Those words grow distant as I look at your face[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C#m[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]
No, I don't wanna go it a-lone[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]

[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]
And I never thought I'd lay my heart on the line[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]B[/ch]
But everything a-bout you is telling me this time[/tab]

[Chorus]

[tab]         [ch]E[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]  [ch]C#m[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]F#m[/ch]
It's for-e-ver, this time I know it there's no doubt in my mind[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]B[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]B[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]F#m[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
For-e-ver. Until my life is through, girl I'll be lovin you for-e-ver.[/tab]


[Instrumental]

[ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]

[Pre-Chorus 2]

[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]
I see my future when I look in your eyes[/tab]

[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]
It took your love to make my heart come a-live[/tab]

[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]B[/ch]
'Cause I lived my life believing all love is blind[/tab]

[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]B[/ch]
But everything a-bout you is telling me this time[/tab]

[Chorus]

[tab]         [ch]E[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]  [ch]C#m[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]F#m[/ch]
It's for-e-ver, this time I know it there's no doubt in my mind[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]B[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]B[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]F#m[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
For-e-ver. Until my life is through, girl I'll be lovin you for-e-ver.[/tab]


[tab]            [ch]E[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]  [ch]C#m[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]F#m[/ch]
Oh, its for-e-ver, this time I know it there's no doubt in my mind[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]B[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]B[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]F#m[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
For-e-ver. Until my life is through, girl I'll be lovin you for-e-ver.[/tab]


[Fade out...]
